person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Ancestors: Family Search
The Life Summary of Sir John Alexander of
"When Sir John Alexander of Blair 9th Lord of Blair was born in 1547, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John III Blair, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Cunningham, was 41. 

He married Lady Grizel Sempill on 11 May 1565, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 November 1609, in Blair, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Perth, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom."

WikiTree
"As a young man, John lived through the Scottish Reformation, the process by which Scotland broke with the Catholic church and developed a predominantly Presbyterian-oriented Calvinist national church.[10] The family lived at Blair House, a stone Norman keep with a moat and a drawbridge that served as the baronial mansion.[11] It is located about two miles southeast of Dalry in Northern Ayrshire, approximately twenty miles southwest of Glasgow, and five miles from the coast of the Firth of Clyde.[12]

John acquired the patronage of the geographically adjacent church of Dalry, which continued on with the family after his death.[13] The family had a long affiliation, at least 100 years, with the church in Dalry as evidenced by his great-grandfather's troubles with the Archbishop of Glasgow for bringing Sir Thomas Brown into the church on 21 July 1510. Since Sir Brown had been excommunicated he was not allowed to associate with parishioners much less be on church grounds. Refusing to leave, Sir Thomas was forcibly ejected and great-grandfather John Blair had to answer for his actions to the Archbishop on 31 July 1510.[14]

John Blair died in 1609 and was succeeded to Blair by his eldest living son Bryce, as his oldest son John, died before his father.[2]"



John V Blair of Blair
Birthdate:circa 1547
Birthplace: Blair, Ayrshire, Scotland 
Death:Died November 11, 1609 in Bankhead, Aberdeen City, Scotland
Immediate Family:
Son of John Blair, III and Margaret Cunningham of Glengarnock
Husband of Grizel Semple, of Semphill & Blair
Father of John Blair of that Ilk; Gavin Blair of Hally; Hugh Blair; Bryce Blair; Anna Blair and 6 others
Brother of Jean Blair and William Blair
About John V Blair of Blair
John Blair V (15..-1609) of that Ilk entered into a bond of mutual assistance with Lord Robert boyd in 1575. In 1576/7, he and his brother William were tried and found guilty of persuing Thomas Crawfurd for his slaughter. This seems to have whetted his interest in the law. He was on the assize in 1580, at the trial of Arthour Hamiltoune in Bothwelbauche, for being concerned in the murder of the Regents, Murray and Lennox. He was one of the sureties in 1593 for John Earl of Monteath, who was accused of the slaughter of Sir Thomas Kennedy of Culzean. In 1595, he and his son Bryce appeared as witnessess in a charter by Thomas Craufurd (the one he had 'persued for slaughter'?) and Margaret Craufurd his spouce, to their son-in-law John Blair of Giffordland. In 1600, a discharge was granted by him to the burgh of Irvine for the parsonage teinds of some lands near that town, he described as 'Blair of that Ilk, sometyme tutor to James Cuninghame of Mountgreenan, on behalf of the said James'. In 1602, he was one of the 'Preloquutouris' for the pannel for the trial of John Mure of Auchindran,e accused of the slaughter of Sir Thomas Kennedy of Culzean. In the same year, he and his son John were on the trial of Allaster McGregor for being at the 'Conflict of Glenfruine'. John Blair of that Ilk, elder, appeared in various testamentary documents until 1609, in which year he was mentioned in the testatment of '.... Fairlie, lawfull sone and air to vmqle David Fairlie of Over Mynok, wt., in the parochin of Dalry'. He seems to have died soon afterwards.

John Blair V was married to Grizel, daughter of Robert the third Lord Semple. They are mentioned in a charter of 8th February 1573 as 'johanni Blair de oedem, et Grizeldae Semple ejus sponsae, terrarum Thornlie-Wallce ...'. They had numerous children, of whom five sons and four daughters reached mature years:- Had four charters of lands, 1573-97
------

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair was born in 1547, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, was 22 and his mother, Lady Margaret Cunningham, was 14. He married Grizel Sempill on 11 May 1565, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 11 November 1609, in Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, United States, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Grizel Sempill le 11 mai 1565, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. November 1609 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blairが1547年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blair of that Ilkは22歳，母Lady Margaret Cunninghamは14歳であった。1565年5月11日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでGrizel Sempillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年11月11日にアメリカ合衆国サウスダコタ州ジャクソンカストルで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトバック ビーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair(이)가 1547년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Cunningham(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1565년 5월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Grizel Sempill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 11월 11일 미국 사우스다코타 주 잭슨 카스틀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 바크 브이그에 묻혔다.

ru.Blair Castle, Ayrshire, Kingdom of Scotl: кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair родился в 1547 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Cunningham, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Grizel Sempill 11 мая 1565 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 ноября 1609 г. в местности кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности бак биг, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Kingdom of Sc: Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.Blair Castle, Ayrshire, Kingdom of Scotl: Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sur, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 11th Lord of Blair nació en 1547, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Cunningham, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Grizel Sempill el 11 de mayo de 1565, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1609, en Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Bac Beag, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
